description:
Cross-asset L1 market data feed covering Equities, FX, and Crypto.
Publishes real-time quotes (top of book) and trade executions.

## Topic Structure
All topics follow the pattern: `marketData/{assetClass}/{dataType}/{version}/{venue}/{identifier}`

## Wildcard Examples
- `marketData/>` - All market data
- `marketData/*/quotes/L1/>` - All L1 quotes
- `marketData/EQ/>` - All equity data
- `marketData/CRYPTO/*/v1/BINANCE/>` - All Binance crypto data
tags: capital markets, market data, stocks, crypto, fx, tickers, wall street, prices, quotes, trades
name: Multi-Asset-Market-Data
